title: Weekly Insights Review
summary:
Read here everything you need to know


Million tons of exports are now expected
Waste-based biofuels could be a key driver of the energy transition transforming today's limited supply of low-carbon transportation fuels and creating a local, circular economy, according to a new report by research and consultancy group Wood Mackenzie. Read More

A lot can happen in eight minutes
A lot can happen in eight minutes. You can read eight pages of a novel.

children.title: The path to a recession is rarely a straight line

children.section_path_text: The path to a recession is rarely a straight line
children.summary:

children.title: A risk off tone across markets saw commodity markets come under pressure
section_path: A risk off tone across markets saw commodity markets come under pressure
children.section_path_text: A risk off tone across markets saw commodity markets come under pressure
children.summary:
This was exacerbated by worsening outbreaks of COVID-19 in China, raising fears of further lockdowns weakening demand. Read More

children.title: Imports from Indonesia have remained the primary source of imports and Russia the second largest source
section_path: Imports from Indonesia have remained the primary source of imports and Russia the second largest source
children.section_path_text: Imports from Indonesia have remained the primary source of imports and Russia the second largest source
children.summary: China's coal import data for July by origin was recently released and shows that imports from Indonesia have remained the primary source of imports and Russia the second largest source.

children.title: China Sufferd Power Shortage Amid Extreme Weather Conditions
section_path: China Sufferd Power Shortage Amid Extreme Weather Conditions
children.section_path_text: China Sufferd Power Shortage Amid Extreme Weather Conditions
children.summary:
There had been a shortage of power supply caused by high temperatures and worsened by sparse rains in major Chinese provinces including Sichuan, Chongqing, Zhejiang, Anhui and Jiangsu. Read More
